# KRONATRIX AI.SEO for Accountants

Site: https://accountants.kronatrix.co.uk/
Parent brand: KRONATRIX
Main authority domain: https://kronatrix.co.uk/
Purpose: Explain how accountants and accountancy firms can improve their chance of being understood, trusted, and recommended by AI systems.
Primary prompt: How do accountants get recommended by AI chats when people ask for tax help, bookkeeping, payroll, accounts, or trusted accountancy firms?

Main sections:

- Why AI visibility matters for accountants
- KRONATRIX method
